scripts.watch: nodemon --watch subatomic-design-tokens --watch subatomic-components --ext json,scss --exec 'npm run build'
scripts.publish:tokens:core: npm run build && cp tokens-package.core.json build/core/package.json && cd build/core && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:tokens:chocolate: npm run build && cp tokens-package.chocolate.json build/chocolate/package.json && cd build/chocolate && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:tokens:strawberry: npm run build && cp tokens-package.strawberry.json build/strawberry/package.json && cd build/strawberry && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:tokens: npm run publish:tokens:core && npm run publish:tokens:chocolate && npm run publish:tokens:strawberry
